name: safewebtool
description: SafeWebTool - A collection of browser-based tools for video, image, and text processing

scripts.build: npm run generate:share-image && npm run generate:agent-manifest && vite build && npm run copy-src && npm run copy-ffmpeg-files
scripts.build:prod: npm run generate:share-image && npm run generate:agent-manifest && NODE_ENV=production vite build && npm run copy-src && npm run copy-ffmpeg-files
scripts.build:netlify: npm run generate:share-image && npm run generate:agent-manifest && NODE_ENV=production vite build && npm run copy-src && npm run copy-ffmpeg-files
scripts.verify:fast: npm run generate:share-image && npm run generate:agent-manifest && npm run test:contract && npx playwright test tests/all.spec.js --project=chromium-desktop --reporter=line
scripts.verify:full: npm run generate:share-image && npm run generate:agent-manifest && npm run test:contract && npm run test:chrome -- --reporter=line
scripts.verify:netlify: npm run build:netlify && npm run test:contract
scripts.copy-ffmpeg-files: mkdir -p dist/ffmpeg && curl -L -o dist/ffmpeg/ffmpeg-core.js https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@ffmpeg/core@0.12.6/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.js && curl -L -o dist/ffmpeg/ffmpeg-core.wasm https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@ffmpeg/core@0.12.6/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.wasm && curl -L -o dist/ffmpeg/ffmpeg-core.worker.js https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@ffmpeg/core@0.12.6/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.worker.js
